[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100101 3
1 0001000 1
2 0000000 a
3 0000010 1
4 1000111 4
5 1001000 2
6 1110111 6
7 1111111 a

61 16 1100111 5
72 27 1011111 6

37 73 1011000 3
